changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_activity AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_activity_id, a.id AS activity_id, a.uid AS activity_uid, a.code, a.name AS name_default, a.start_date::timestamp AS start_date, a.end_date::timestamp AS end_date, coalesce(a.planned_duration_days, a.end_date::date - a.start_date::date) as planned_duration_days, a.project_id, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(a.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), a.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(a.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), a.name)) AS name_ar, a.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(a.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(a.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.activity a;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_activity;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_activity_slm ON analytics.dim_activity (source_last_modified_at);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_activity_slm;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_activity_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_activity (activity_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_activity_uid_uniq;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_activity_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_activity (source_last_modified_at, activity_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_activity_slm_uid;
